message:
debug(frankensqlite): add parameter logging to query and execute methods

Enhances debug output for sqlmodel-frankensqlite integration by logging
bound parameters alongside SQL statements. This helps trace the exact
values being sent to frankensqlite during macro-generated queries.

Changes:
- query_sync: Now logs params array with SQL (truncated to 80 chars)
- execute_sync: Same parameter logging format for consistency

Format: [DEBUG] query_sync: sql=<sql> params=[<param1>, <param2>, ...]

This is particularly useful when debugging issues with:
- Model::insert_returning() generated queries
- Bulk insert parameter binding
- Type coercion mismatches between Rust types and SQLite values

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
